title: 10 Settlement of Electronic Bill Payments
body_text:
10	Settlement of Electronic Bill Payments
10.1	Settlement between Central 1 and the Financial Institution
Settlement is posted to the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 account by 5:30 am PT (8:30 am ET) on the business day following receipt of the bill payment transactions at Central 1. The settlement effective date is the date Central 1 receives the payment. For payments sent to Central 1 on Saturdays, Sundays, or statutory holidays, settlement is also posted on the business day following receipt of the bill payment transactions at Central 1, but the settlement effective date isnГўВҖВҷt backdated.
Note: 	Payments to Vancity VISA, Vancity Com. Inv. Bank Visa, and Community VISA received after 3:00 pm PT will be sent to the biller on the following business day. Settlement will be posted to the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 account on the business day after the transaction is sent to the biller. Financial Institutions in Ontario can refer to Section 9.10, BPTP ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payments 15:00 (Pacific) Billers.
A bill payment settlement entry is posted to the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs CentralВ 1 account as code ГўВҖВңBT,ГўВҖВқ Bill Payment Settlement. Bill payment adjustments are posted as code ГўВҖВңBA,ГўВҖВқ Bill Payment Adjustment. Tax payments are posted as code ГўВҖВңTX,ГўВҖВқ BillPay Tax Settlement.
For financial institutions that participate in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System but donГўВҖВҷt have an account with Central 1, settlement will be provided via AFT.
10.2	Settlement between the Financial Institution and the Customer
Ensure that the customerГўВҖВҷs account is debited before the bill payment is sent to CentralВ 1 because the funds are guaranteed.
10.3	Settlement to the CustomerГўВҖВҷs Biller Account
Most billers credit their customersГўВҖВҷ accounts on the day they receive payment, which is typically the business day after Central 1 receives the payment. It is a good practice to advise customers to submit payments at least two business days before the due date.
END
